headlines.headline: Orevov Solutions files routine patent applications in automated logistics

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not provide immediate or long-term financial impact.

headlines.headline: Crevol Retail Group announces breakthrough in precision manufacturing

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
